description: The single most important dashboard. Shows platform health, SLO compliance, error rates, capacity status, and user experience across every LGTM component in one view. Designed for a 5-second read.

options.content:
Platform KPI — Single Pane of Glass

Enterprise Observability Platform • All Signals • Real-Time

● LIVE

panels.title: Grafana
panels.description: Grafana UI availability based on non-5xx responses.

panels.title: Mimir
panels.description: Mimir metrics backend availability based on non-5xx responses.

panels.title: Loki
panels.description: Loki log backend availability based on non-5xx responses.

panels.title: Tempo
panels.description: Tempo tracing backend availability based on non-5xx responses.

panels.title: Pyroscope
panels.description: Pyroscope profiling backend availability based on non-5xx responses.

panels.title: UI SLO (≤1s)
panels.description: Percentage of Grafana UI requests completing within 1 second. Target: 99%.

panels.title: Metrics Write SLO (≤0.5s)
panels.description: Percentage of Mimir metric write requests completing within 500ms. Target: 99%.

panels.title: Log Write SLO (≤0.5s)
panels.description: Percentage of Loki log write requests completing within 500ms. Target: 99%.

panels.title: Query SLO (≤0.5s)
panels.description: Percentage of Mimir query requests enqueued within 500ms. Target: 99%.

panels.title: Error Budget (30d)
panels.description: Composite error budget remaining over 30 days across all LGTM components. Below 20% indicates accelerated burn.

panels.title: Active Users
panels.description: Number of active Grafana users currently logged in.

panels.title: Total Dashboards
panels.description: Total number of dashboards provisioned across the platform.

panels.title: Active Series (Mimir)
panels.description: Total active time series across all Mimir ingesters. Key capacity indicator.

panels.title: Log Streams (Loki)
panels.description: Total active log streams held in memory across Loki ingesters.

panels.title: Active Alerts
panels.description: Number of currently firing alerts across the platform. High counts indicate systemic issues.

panels.title: Platform Error Rate
panels.description: Error rate across all 5 platform components. Any line crossing 1% needs attention.

panels.title: Platform Request Volume
panels.description: Total request throughput across main platform components. Shows load distribution.

panels.title: Component P95 Latency
panels.description: P95 latency per component. All should be under 1s for good user experience.

panels.title: Ingestion Volume
panels.description: Data ingestion rate across all signal types.

options.content:
Platform Engineering • Observability Infrastructure
Executive Summary → SLA Report → Risk Intelligence → Health Matrix → Anomaly Detection →

title: Platform KPI — Single Pane of Glass
